allow: Bash(node -e "['ja','en','km'].forEach\(l => { try { JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('locales/'+l+'.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\(l, 'OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(l, 'FAIL', e.message\); } }\);")

Bash(python -c "import json; [json.load\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\)\) for f in ['c:/work/FishLink/locales/ja.json', 'c:/work/FishLink/locales/en.json', 'c:/work/FishLink/locales/km.json']]; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const c=fs.readFileSync\('c:/work/FishLink/pages/restaurant/comments.html','utf8'\);const m=c.match\(/<script type=\\"module\\">\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\);if\(!m\){console.log\('no script'\);process.exit\(1\)}try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\('script syntax OK'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('SYNTAX ERROR:',e.message\)}")

Bash(node -e 'console.log\("JSON ja", !!JSON.parse\(require\("fs"\).readFileSync\("locales/ja.json","utf8"\)\).home.sectionOrders\); console.log\("JSON en", !!JSON.parse\(require\("fs"\).readFileSync\("locales/en.json","utf8"\)\).fishlist.filter\); console.log\("JSON km", !!JSON.parse\(require\("fs"\).readFileSync\("locales/km.json","utf8"\)\).home.viewFarmer\);')

Bash(node -e 'const c=require\("fs"\).readFileSync\("pages/restaurant/fish-list.html","utf8"\); console.log\("len",c.length\); console.log\("has #103 marker:", c.includes\("#103"\)\); console.log\("has fl-grid:", c.includes\("fl-grid"\)\); console.log\("has fl-sheet:", c.includes\("filter-sheet"\)\);')

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./locales/ja.json'\); console.log\('POST KEYS:'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(j.post||{}\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('\\nFISH KEYS:'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(j.fish||{}\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('\\nHAS home:', !!j.home, ' fishlist:', !!j.fishlist\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./locales/ja.json'\); console.log\('DASHBOARD:', Object.keys\(j.dashboard||{}\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('\\nGAQP:', JSON.stringify\(j.gaqp||{}\)\); console.log\('\\nFISHLIST:', Object.keys\(j.fishlist||{}\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('\\nHOME:', Object.keys\(j.home||{}\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./locales/ja.json'\).post; for \(const k of ['sectionDelivery','deliveryRate','deliveryRateExample','freeDeliveryDistance','deliveryNote1','deliveryNote2','maxDistance','minOrder','gutPrice','priceResult','priceHint','sectionTerms','optional']\) console.log\(k+': '+JSON.stringify\(j[k]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./locales/ja.json'\); const d=j.dashboard; for \(const k of ['stock','pause','resume','edit','delete','deleteAfterPause','confirmDelete','active','inactive','size','outOfStock']\) console.log\('dashboard.'+k+': '+JSON.stringify\(d[k]\)\); console.log\('fish.other:', JSON.stringify\(j.fish.other\)\);")

Bash(node -e "for\(const l of ['ja','en','km']\){const j=require\('./locales/'+l+'.json'\); if\(!j.post.deliverySheetSave||!j.dashboard.groupSoldout||!j.fishlist.newFarmer||!j.home.campaignOff||!j.fish.otherShort\) throw new Error\('missing '+l\); } console.log\('verify OK: all keys present, JSON valid'\);")
Bash(python -c "import json;[print\(l,'OK'\) or json.load\(open\('locales/%s.json'%l,encoding='utf-8'\)\) for l in ['ja','en','km']]")
